confidence_rationale: Video consists entirely of promotional/institutional collage material with title card, graduation ceremony photos, operating room team photos, surgical procedure montages, and celebratory imagery. technique_summary: Not scoreable. Content is institutional/promotional material documenting a laparoscopic training program event, not a trainee or expert performing an FLS task.
notes: This video is a promotional/documentary montage of a laparoscopic training program event (title visible: 'Laparoscopic Training Program World Laparoscopy Hospital Program 2014'). It contains no evaluable FLS task performance and therefore cannot be scored per FLS rubric. Video should be excluded from performance assessment.
